single_writer_rule: The conductor alone writes canonical run artifacts; workers return schema-valid results.

phases.gate: Repository and ecosystem inventory is complete.
Sources and claims satisfy freshness, authority, license, and coverage rules.
Schemas, platform interfaces, safety policy, and acceptance criteria are decision-complete.
Cross-platform, routing, security, and rendering suites pass.
Fresh-context verification and every release requirement pass.

worker_rules: Workers receive the minimum relevant context and may not broaden mutation authority.
Workers cite source IDs and identify uncertainty, contradictions, and missing evidence.
Workers do not write to shared final destinations or claim overall completion.
Transient failures receive one retry; authentication and schema failures do not.
A required failed worker marks the run incomplete and blocks a complete-audit claim.

ten_lens_checklist.check: Account inputs and source coverage are complete.
Assumptions, benchmark fit, and model uncertainty are disclosed.
Operator context and user-reported failures affect requirements.
Diagnosis, causality, and financial math are explicit.
Cross-platform opportunities and conflicts are considered.
Attribution, creative, budget, tracking, landing, and policy cohere.
Creative and customer experience receive human review where judgment matters.
Unknowns, failed hypotheses, and demoted claims remain visible.
Outputs are decision-complete and assign owners.
Measurement, re-audit, and regression capture are defined.
